tasks.name: OPC-UA AccessLevel=0 for Inactive Profile Nodes
tasks.description: In collapsed mode, create OPC-UA nodes for the inactive profile with AccessLevel=0 and StatusCode BadNotReadable (PRD 3.2.1). Add inactive_config parameter to OpcuaServer. In _build_node_tree(), after active nodes, create inactive profile nodes with AccessLevel=0, BadNotReadable status, EURange/EngineeringUnits/MinimumSamplingInterval. Do NOT add to sync loop. In realistic mode skip (no inactive concept per-server). Wire through CLI: load other profile config, pass to OpcuaServer. Test: inactive nodes exist with AccessLevel=0, BadNotReadable status, not synced.

tasks.name: Profile-Specific LWT Topic
tasks.description: Make LWT topic profile-specific. Change MqttProtocolConfig.lwt_topic default to empty string. In MQTT publisher startup, auto-generate from topic_prefix/line_id/status when empty. Explicit lwt_topic in config used as-is for backward compat. Update both YAML configs to remove explicit lwt_topic or set profile-specific paths. Test: auto-generated LWT includes line_id, explicit config preserved, profiles produce different topics.

tasks.name: Validate All Fixes — Full Suite
tasks.description: Run ruff + mypy + pytest full suite. Run batch sim with both profiles (packaging + F&B). Verify no regressions. Fix any failures.
